name: 40 Inch Navy Blue 1 Balloon for First Birthday, Blue One 1st Number Balloon Birthday Decorations, 10th 21st, Giant Number 1 Balloon
bullets: 【Impress Your Guests with the 40 inch Number Balloon】Make your birthday celebration extra special with this number balloon. It's perfect for creating a playful backdrop for memorable photoshoots, this adorable number balloons 40 inch is sure to bring smiles to your loved one's face on their special day. Don't let your party be a snooze fest - add some excitement and style with our fantastic blue birthday decorations today!

【Helium or Natural Air Both Work Well for this Balloon】This 1 balloon is the ultimate party accessory for 1 10 12 13 14 15 16 18 21 years old birthday decorations for boy and man! You can inflate the 1 balloon number with helium for a floating effect or blow it up with natural air to hang it up as a decoration. Either way, this sturdy blue number balloon won't disappoint. It's perfect for long-lasting celebrations that will leave a lasting impression on your guests.

【Radiant Blue Elegance】The birthday number balloon feature a vibrant, luminous blue hue that exudes timeless elegance and creates an enchanting focal point at birthday parties and anniversaries. Their gleaming opulence bathes your event in warm, lavish ambiance, ensuring they become an indelible part of your cherished memories. Elevate your occasion with these dazzling 1 birthday balloon, perfect for birthdays and anniversaries, that deserve a touch of resplendent brilliance.

【Save Time and Effort with a Balloon that Self-Seals and Reusable】You could manually use your mouth on the straw with natural air to inflate or deflate the 1 number balloon. Just simply locate the end with arrow tab, pull the number 1 balloon open, and use the straw to blow air into the blue number balloon until it's 90% fully inflated. After the party, deflate the 1st birthday decorations for or boy by opening the tab and using a long straw to release the air.

【Party Like a Pro with These Awesome Party Decorations】Ready to throw a birthday party like a pro? These Blue party decorations are a must-have for your celebration, and they're super cute too! This blue number foil balloons make a great focal point for your party and can match any blue theme or decorations, match with other numbers for your loved one, making them perfect for any age. Plus, they're an awesome prop to hold while snapping photos to share with all your friends!

reviews.name: Sarah
reviews.title: Just as good as the balloons in store
reviews.body: I was honestly so impressed with this number balloon! For the price, the quality is surprisingly good, it looks great once inflated and definitely doesn’t feel cheap.

reviews.name: S. Vaughan
reviews.title: Great balloons.
reviews.body: Great balloons! Love them! Easy to blow up! Kept air overnight.

reviews.name: Scallop Pup
reviews.title: Large & lasts
reviews.body: Love how large these balloons are! Color is vibrant and these have stayed firmly inflated for over a week now.

reviews.name: Ulsmich
reviews.title: Good quality, lasts long and did not deflate.
reviews.body: Good quality, lasted a long time! Did noy deflate and looked great in photos.
